title: Initialize repository directory structure
description: Create the standard layout: src/, test/, golden/, notes/, and boot/ directories. Add initial Shen load file or package declaration, .gitignore for compiled artifacts, and a minimal README stub pointing to plan.md.

title: Implement Phase 0 test harness skeleton
description: Write the core test runner (test.shen) supporting module loading, golden file execution with 'input -> expected normal form' format, and static rejection expectations for load/registration/type errors. Include a trivial passing golden case and harness reporting (pass/fail counts).

title: Populate initial golden corpus and rejection fixtures
description: Extract 8-12 golden reduction cases from Book of Shen 21.4 (arith simplification, walk/thrash/simplify equivalents, constant folding like 12*(5-3)->24) into golden/ files. Add rejection test declarations for malformed patterns, unbound RHS vars, and bad attributes even before kernel implementation.

title: Document 4th-edition Shen syntax verification
description: Create notes/syntax-verification.md recording exact usage of datatype, verified side-conditions, defprolog, prolog?, and typed defcc/==> from The Book of Shen 4th ed. Confirm numeric policy (exact integers only for Phase 1) and any corrections needed for harness or kernel code.

title: Implement content-addressed store module
description: Create store.shen providing content hash type, intern table, canonical constructors, and O(1) hash-based equality. Support only stable expression hashing and interning; omit basis, memoization, and rule-driven canonicalization for now.

title: Define expr datatype and canonical constructors
description: Implement expr.shen with tagged atoms (sym, int), compound expression trees, and a pretty-printer stub. Route every constructor through the store module so that structurally identical expressions share the same hash identity from day one.

title: Implement first-order pattern language
description: Build pattern.shen defining pattern vs seq-pattern distinction, literal patterns, blank (_), typed blank, named patterns, and reserved pattern constructors that prevent literal exprs from masquerading as patterns. Add binding extraction stubs and explicit rejection of seq patterns outside argument position.

title: Build checked rules, first-order matcher, and naive reduce
description: Implement rule.shen (checked-rule datatype, extract-bindings, free-symbols, bindings-cover?) and match.shen (literal/blank/named/compound match plus substitution). Add a naive ordered-rule reduce loop in core.shen. Deliver Phase 1 acceptance: reject malformed patterns and unbound RHS, pass first-order golden cases, idempotent reduce, content equality by hash.

title: Add attributes, sequence matching, and AC support
description: Implement attrs.shen with structural (Flat, Orderless, OneIdentity) vs control attributes plus consistency checks and explicit declaration syntax. Extend store canonicalization for Orderless sort and Flat flatten. Create match-seq.shen (Prolog BlankSequence/BlankNullSequence) and match-ac.shen (permutation + flattening matchers + AC blowup warning).

title: Introduce immutable db, basis, and normal-form memoization
description: Implement db.shen: datoms for rules/attributes, immutable basis values, basis hash, pure assert-rule/assert-attribute, symbol-entry-view, and db fork primitive. Replace naive rule list with db assertions. Add normal-form keyed by (term-content-hash, basis-hash) with the guarantee that it agrees with reduce. Update core to use basis-aware evaluation.
